name: Animal Habitat Explorer
description: Legacy biology habitat scene. Biology now uses 2D photo/diagram material by default because 3D is restricted.
subject: biology / 2D only
defaultHints: Which animal is a predator, and which animal eats mostly fruit or leaves?
What habitat features help these animals survive?
How would the food chain change if one animal disappeared?
safetyNotes: Wild animals should be observed from a safe distance and protected in their natural habitats.
